description: Dollar Radar v3 - FRED trade-weighted dollar family + 13 bilateral crosses + BBDXY Replica (Bloomberg Dollar Spot back-engineered: 12-constituent fixed-weight geometric basket, official target weights, per-currency contribution attribution, broad-vs-DXY breadth spread) + 10-signal pump/dump canary composite + double top/bottom detection. data/dollar-radar.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Dollar Radar - every 6h via EventBridge Scheduler, re-scoring the dollar pump/dump canary composite as the FRED liquidity, rate and volatility feeds update.
